title: 第1節　針を落とす前
prompt: Create one cinematic 16:9 scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第3章　灯りの底 / 第2話　夜更けのレコード. Shared talk background: 第3章第2話の夜レコード背景. Background reference prompt: Cinematic late-night apartment living room opening to a balcony after a satisfying Sunday. Show a warm standing lamp, a record player or audio corner, a small finished supper tray, record sleeves, the balcony railing, distant city lights, and a calm deep-blue night atmosphere. The space should feel lived-in, modest, comfortable, and emotionally complete. Preserve the same place, architecture, time of day, weather, lighting, and atmosphere unless the scene text explicitly changes them. Use the same talk-level setting as the public-facing stage that Sato naturally notices first. Scene focus: 第1節　針を落とす前 / サトーパート. Summary: 帰宅して上着を椅子へ掛けると、部屋の空気は朝より少しだけ親しく感じられた。サトーは惣菜を皿へ移し、湯を沸かし、簡単な汁物だけ作ってテーブルへ並べる。派手なものは何もないが、自分… Key beats: 帰宅して上着を椅子へ掛けると、部屋の空気は朝より少しだけ親しく感じられた。サトーは惣菜を皿へ移し、湯を沸かし、簡単な汁物だけ作ってテーブルへ並べる。派手なものは何もないが、自分のタイミングで温かいものを口にできるだけで、夜としては充分整っていた。 鯖の塩気はきつすぎず、卵焼きの甘さも控えめだった。スーパーの惣菜は、期待しすぎないくらいがちょうどいい。そして期待しすぎなければ、だいたいちゃんと応えてくれる。サトーは茶を一口飲み、今日は一日じゅう、必要なものだけでうまく回っていたなと思う。 「外で食べなくても、このくらいで充分いいんだよな」 食後の皿を流しへ置いてから、レコード棚の前へ立つ。ジャズの列も悪くないが、今夜はもう少し乾いた音のほうが似合う気がした。サトーは背表紙を指で追い、古いロカビリーの盤を一枚引き抜く。軽く跳ねるギターと丸いベースなら、今日の余韻を壊さずに済む。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-episode: サトー. Keep him consistent with the episode-specific portrait generated from the canonical Sato image. Compose for a 1920x1080 delivery, keep main subjects near the center, and preserve enough left/right safe margin so the image still reads well in portrait scrolling mode. Use the installment-specific Sato portrait for Sato. Use Sera's canonical portrait directly without redesigning her for this installment. Sera never carries knives or other bladed weapons; if she uses a tool, keep it small, discreet, and non-bladed. For Sato-side images, Sato is dominant and any Sera presence must stay clearly separate and unreadable as a casual companion. For Sera-side images, Sera is dominant, the attacker must not resemble Sato, and Sato must remain an unaware background figure looking elsewhere. Preserve the feeling of a refined but ordinary Sunday, and compose for a 1920x1080 delivery with the main subjects near the center and safe margins on both sides so the image also works in portrait scrolling layouts.
